title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Sherpa Fleece Blanket (200x240 cm) - Greek Pattern Bed Throw King Size - Fluffy Throws For Bed, Sofas, Armchair - Thermal, Cosy Large Blankets and Throws Washable - Black
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Made from 100% high-quality polyester material for a luxuriously soft and cozy feel. perfect for staying warm during chilly nights or breezy outdoor adventures.
VERSATILE DESIGN: Elevate your bedroom decor with a stylish greek blanket that complements any aesthetic, or use it as an elegant throw for your living space.
PERFECT KING SIZE: 200cm x 240cm – ideal for beds, couches, and armchair. essential daily use blanket and home decoration.
BREATHABLE & ANTI-ALLERGY BLANKET: Designed to reduce allergens, making it suitable for sensitive skin sleepers. promotes airflow to keep you cosy and comfortable throughout the night.
EASY CARE: Machine wash in cool water. wash before use. wash dark colours separately. do not bleach. do not dry clean. keep away from fire and flame.
description: VERA GREEK THROW ★These throws are the ideal way to keep your precious little ones warm, cosy and protected from the chilly air. ★Available in a number of eye catching colours, these stunning and colourful greek throw provide a comfortable, soft place to snuggle up and relax. ★Each durable item is crafted from high-quality material to ensure a superior finished product. ★ Sumptuous living: a step towards luxury, delicacy and your desired softness. ★ This soft, durable throw is exceptionally comfortable and gentle against your delicate skin, allowing them to slumber peacefully in their gorgeous bedding set throughout the night ★ Settle down to a restful and peaceful sleep underneath this soft and comfortable throw, adorned with this adorable design. ★ This durable throw is designed with luxury and comfort in mind and are a fantastic way to breath new life into your tired bedroom décor. ★Material: 100% Polyester ★Sizes: Double - ( 150X200 cm ) King - ( 200X240 cm ) ★Care Instructions: Machine Washable.Washable at 40 °C. Do not Dry clean. Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature. Iron at low temperature. Steam ironing may be a risk. ★Brand:GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Note: All Photographs are for illustration purposes only. Actual colours may slightly vary from the pictures.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Do Not Bleach, Do not Dry clean, Keep Away From Fire and Flame, Machine Wash, Wash Dark Colours Separately
